## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change, and why? -->

## Area

- [ ] Bridge (`bridge/`) — Mac Node service
- [ ] Firmware (`firmware/`) — ESP32 sketch
- [ ] Design / mockup (`design/`)
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Bridge changes: `cd bridge && node --test` passes (and I added/updated tests)
- [ ] Firmware changes: verified on hardware, **or** clearly marked as awaiting on-device test
- [ ] No secrets/tokens committed; the remote command surface stays allowlisted
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
